title: athlete-enrollment — field classification
description: AthleteEnrollment carries mostly internal-tier structural data. Notes fields (enrollment_notes, coach_notes) are confidential-tier (HR/coach-visible only). Consent snapshot inherits the tier of its constituent flags (mostly internal — the FACT of consent is not sensitive; the DATA those consents unlock is).

regulated_minor: For enrollments of MINOR athletes: the enrollment surface inherits the regulated_minor tier for cross-tenant reads.
audit_log: AthleteEnrollment.status (every transition — audit-critical, 7-year retention for withdrawn/expelled)

notes: AthleteEnrollment carries NO PII directly — the PII is in the linked Athlete + Team + Season. Cross-tenant regulated_minor stripping applies transitively.
Coach notes are coach-only — never surfaced to guardians / athletes / peers.
Consent snapshot is a POINT-IN-TIME copy. Even when the athlete revokes consents later, the enrollment's snapshot preserves the state at confirm time for audit.
